feed.description: Recurring guests from other shows revisit their positions.
feed.title: Cross-Show

bullets: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about systems thinking, and I'm joined by Dr. Elena Fischer, returning systems thinker. Dr. Elena Fischer, thanks for being here.
Thanks, Sam. Excited for this one — systems thinking is something I've been thinking about a lot.
In our 2024 conversation I was more optimistic about top-down interventions. I've revised that — the work happens at the seams.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about systems thinking, and I'm joined by Dr. Elena Fischer, returning systems thinker. Dr. Elena Fischer, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Systems Thinking, Two Years Later
